case_title: DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE,INC. VS. ALEXANDER GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,433.91 FILED BY DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 125.00 - SERVED MAR-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ALEXANDER
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE,INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COOPERATIVE,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ALEXANDER $1,433.91 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,588.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
